subcodes.first_line: ...Thou hast asked whether to enlist in the Socialist party. The Bahá'ís must be in the Bahá'í Cause which comprehends all the degrees and is perfect from every standpoint.
subcodes.subjects: @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @non-participation in politics, @critiques of capitalism, communism, socialism, @universality of the Cause
